missionFrame.dramaticQuestion: What kind of acting captain takes command when loyalty, rescue, and incomplete information collide?

forbiddenOutcomes: end the campaign from a single failed check
expose Director-only truth without causal discovery

phases.title: Arrival Briefing
phases.summary: The newly promoted XO receives the Nerine mission, reviews ship limits, and decides how to divide command attention between formal survey work and local traffic pressure.
pressures: Traffic at the Gate is already waiting
The replacement pallet is reporting small inconsistencies
phases.directorPurpose: The newly promoted XO receives the Nerine mission, reviews ship limits, and decides how to divide command attention between formal survey work and local traffic pressure.

phases.title: First Sounding
phases.summary: The Glass Harbor conducts a calibration run while local pilot Senn Arv offers route knowledge that conflicts with the latest scan.
objectives: Decide how to combine formal and local evidence
pressures: Publishing a correction will embarrass Survey Command
phases.directorPurpose: The Glass Harbor conducts a calibration run while local pilot Senn Arv offers route knowledge that conflicts with the latest scan.
playerFacingObjectives: Decide how to combine formal and local evidence

phases.title: The Reef Turns
phases.summary: A sudden inversion folds the route behind Rhos’s shuttle. The ship must preserve itself, protect nearby traffic, and attempt contact without reliable geometry.
objectives: Recover evidence of the shuttle path
pressures: Rhos and Kor are cut off
The tractor system is approaching thermal limits
Two civilian ships are on diverging unsafe vectors
phases.directorPurpose: A sudden inversion folds the route behind Rhos’s shuttle. The ship must preserve itself, protect nearby traffic, and attempt contact without reliable geometry.
playerFacingObjectives: Recover evidence of the shuttle path

phases.title: Search or Survival
phases.summary: Immediate rescue attempts compete with the need to stabilize the Gate and avoid losing the ship. The player decides how much risk to spend before assuming command.
objectives: Establish the first credible search data
pressures: The crew still looks to Rhos’s standing orders
Kheled and civilian vessels are requesting direction
phases.directorPurpose: Immediate rescue attempts compete with the need to stabilize the Gate and avoid losing the ship. The player decides how much risk to spend before assuming command.
playerFacingObjectives: Establish the first credible search data

phases.title: Acting Command
phases.summary: Starfleet confirms the player as Acting Captain for the emergency. The first open-world opportunities appear while the ship anchors at Quiet Shelf.
objectives: Assign the Rhos search as an ongoing operation
pressures: No available choice satisfies every request
The crew is assessing whether the player will imitate Rhos or establish a distinct command culture
phases.directorPurpose: Starfleet confirms the player as Acting Captain for the emergency. The first open-world opportunities appear while the ship anchors at Quiet Shelf.
playerFacingObjectives: Assign the Rhos search as an ongoing operation

decisionPoints.title: Evidence Standard
decisionPoints.prompt: What evidentiary standard will the ship use when instruments and local pilot memory disagree?
decisionPoints.stakes: Survey credibility; Local trust; Transit delay
decisionPoints.optionsPolicy: Options are examples; accept any causally grounded freeform command intent.

decisionPoints.title: Rescue Posture
decisionPoints.prompt: How much ship and civilian risk will the player accept in the first attempt to recover Rhos?
decisionPoints.stakes: Captain Rhos; Civilian lives; Glass Harbor condition; Acting-command legitimacy
decisionPoints.optionsPolicy: Options are examples; accept any causally grounded freeform command intent.

decisionPoints.title: First Regional Priority
decisionPoints.prompt: Which open request receives the Glass Harbor’s first sustained attention after the inversion?
decisionPoints.stakes: Civilian strain; Search momentum; Faction interpretation
decisionPoints.optionsPolicy: Options are examples; accept any causally grounded freeform command intent.

commandDecisions.title: Evidence Standard
commandDecisions.awardPolicy: Award command insight when the player commits a consequential posture for Evidence Standard.

commandDecisions.title: Rescue Posture
commandDecisions.awardPolicy: Award command insight when the player commits a consequential posture for Rescue Posture.

commandDecisions.title: First Regional Priority
commandDecisions.awardPolicy: Award command insight when the player commits a consequential posture for First Regional Priority.
